aliases: what screens does the dashboard have
where is the view for this route
blurb: Which Vue view owns a route, how the sidebar is grouped, and how Flask serves the SPA.
intent: Give a future agent a one-stop index of every page in the regin dashboard: which Vue view renders each route, how the routes are grouped in the sidebar, which feature flags hide a group, and how the SPA is built and served by Flask. It is a navigational map that hands off to the deep feature topics (memory, trace, rules, topics, live card) rather than re-explaining them.
label: WebUI surface map (Vue 3 SPA pages, router routes, sidebar nav groups & the Flask shell that serves them)
